mapper.select: SELECT SEQ_NO, CLIENT_NO, ADDRESS_TYPE, ADDRESS_DETAIL, LAST_CHANGE_DATE, IS_MAILING_ADDRESS, IS_NEWEST, DEL_FLAG FROM CIF_ADDRESS WHERE CLIENT_NO = #{clientNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND DEL_FLAG = #{delFlag,jdbcType=CHAR}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CIF_ADDRESS ( SEQ_NO, CLIENT_NO, ADDRESS_TYPE, ADDRESS_DETAIL, LAST_CHANGE_DATE, IS_MAILING_ADDRESS, IS_NEWEST, DEL_FLAG ) VALUES ( #{seqNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{clientNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{addressType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{addressDetail,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lastChangeDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{isMailingAddress,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{isNewest,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{delFlag,jdbcType=CHAR} )
mapper.update: UPDATE CIF_ADDRESS SET ADDRESS_TYPE = #{addressType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ADDRESS_DETAIL = #{addressDetail,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LAST_CHANGE_DATE = #{lastChangeDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, IS_MAILING_ADDRESS = #{isMailingAddress,jdbcType=CHAR}, IS_NEWEST = #{isNewest,jdbcType=CHAR}, DEL_FLAG = #{delFlag,jdbcType=CHAR} WHERE SEQ_NO = #{seqNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO CIF_ADDRESS ( SEQ_NO, CLIENT_NO, ADDRESS_TYPE, ADDRESS_DETAIL, LAST_CHANGE_DATE, IS_MAILING_ADDRESS, IS_NEWEST, DEL_FLAG ) VALUES
( #{addr.seqNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{addr.clientNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{addr.addressType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{addr.addressDetail,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{addr.lastChangeDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{addr.isMailingAddress,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{addr.isNewest,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{addr.delFlag,jdbcType=CHAR} )

update.foreach: UPDATE CIF_ADDRESS SET ADDRESS_TYPE = #{addr.addressType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ADDRESS_DETAIL = #{addr.addressDetail,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LAST_CHANGE_DATE = #{addr.lastChangeDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, IS_MAILING_ADDRESS = #{addr.isMailingAddress,jdbcType=CHAR}, IS_NEWEST = #{addr.isNewest,jdbcType=CHAR}, DEL_FLAG = #{addr.delFlag,jdbcType=CHAR} WHERE SEQ_NO = #{addr.seqNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR};
